en.title: Best 4K TVs of 2026: OLED, QD-OLED & Mini-LED Ranked
en.description: The definitive 2026 4K TV ranking across OLED, QD-OLED, and Mini-LED — from the best-value LG C6 to the budget-crushing TCL QM8K.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳 4K 電視排行榜：OLED、QD-OLED 與 Mini-LED 實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年 4K 電視完整排名，從最佳 CP 值的 LG C6 到亮度暴擊的 TCL QM8K，找到最適合你的那一台。

en.description: LG's 2026 Tandem OLED flagship delivers flawless blacks, 4K 165Hz gaming, and class-leading contrast at the most competitive premium price.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年 LG Tandem OLED 主力機，黑色表現無懈可擊，165Hz 電競支援，是旗艦 OLED 中最平衡的選擇。

en.description: Samsung's premium QD-OLED pairs 2,000-nit peak brightness with a matte anti-glare coating — the best OLED choice for bright living rooms.

zh-tw.description: 三星旗艦 QD-OLED，2,000 nits 峰值亮度加上霧面抗反射塗層，是客廳採光強的最強解法，台灣官方售價已可確認。

en.description: Sony's XR Cognitive Processor elevates this QD-OLED beyond its spec sheet — the most cinematic picture quality available in 2026, with Acoustic Multi-Audio that puts sound precisely where the action is.

zh-tw.description: XR 認知處理器讓 Sony Bravia 8 II 的色彩和動態處理比規格表更精緻，搭配 Acoustic Multi-Audio 聲音定位，追劇電影體驗一流。

en.description: The G6 Gallery OLED uses Primary RGB Tandem panel technology to achieve the highest OLED brightness ever measured, ships with a flush wall-mount included.

zh-tw.description: G6 藝廊系列 OLED 用 Primary RGB Tandem 面板創下 OLED 亮度新高，附贈嵌牆式壁掛支架，預算充裕的情況下這是外觀和畫質雙頂的存在。

en.description: Sony's flagship Mini-LED delivers near-OLED contrast through XR Backlight Master Drive local dimming, while reaching brightness levels OLED cannot match.

zh-tw.description: Sony 旗艦 Mini-LED，XR Backlight Master Drive 局部背光控制精準，對比度接近 OLED，同時亮度超過 OLED 天花板，是不想花 OLED 預算的最佳替代。

en.description: Samsung's mid-tier Neo QLED combines 165Hz gaming performance and strong bright-room brightness at a price well below the OLED competition.

zh-tw.description: 三星中端 Neo QLED，165Hz 電競支援加上強悍的明室亮度，比同級 OLED 便宜一大截，台灣三星官網有正式販售。

en.description: At 4,540 nits peak brightness in lab tests, the QM8K out-shines flagship OLEDs for a fraction of the price — an extraordinary value play for bright rooms and gamers.

zh-tw.description: 實測峰值亮度 4,540 nits 比旗艦 OLED 還高，65 吋約 NT$47,900，是採光強環境和電競需求的超高 CP 值選擇。

en.description: Two years running, the U8N delivers class-leading Mini-LED brightness at a price that makes premium brands look overpriced — the go-to for budget-conscious shoppers who refuse to compromise on brightness.

zh-tw.description: 連續多年在同價位段亮度測試稱王，U8N 讓旗艦品牌有點尷尬，預算 NT$35,000 左右又想要高亮度 Mini-LED，就是它了。

en.description: Samsung's entry QD-OLED brings vivid color, deep blacks, and 165Hz gaming to the $1,799 price point — the most affordable path into the QD-OLED ecosystem.

zh-tw.description: 三星入門 QD-OLED，把鮮豔色彩、深黑表現、165Hz 電競打進更親民的價位，是第一次想體驗 OLED 的好起點。

en.description: Hisense's mid-range Mini-LED delivers respectable 1,500-nit brightness and 144Hz gaming at a price that leaves room in your budget for a soundbar.

zh-tw.description: 海信中端 Mini-LED，台灣有正式通路可購買，144Hz 電競支援加上合理亮度，約 NT$24,900 讓你省下一筆預算給音響。

references.title: Best TVs of 2026: Top OLEDs, Mini-LEDs and QLEDs for Every Budget
Sony Bravia 8 II vs Samsung S95F: Which Flagship OLED TV Is Better?
LG C6 OLED Series: Full Specs and Pricing Released
TCL QM8K Review: Blazingly Bright Mini-LED at a Competitive Price

en.commentary:
The 4K TV market in 2026 has become genuinely competitive across every price tier. OLED is no longer a luxury format — it's the mainstream choice for anyone spending over $1,500. QD-OLED has solved the brightness ceiling that held the first generation back, and Mini-LED from TCL and Hisense is routinely outperforming TVs that cost twice as much.

The LG C6 earns the top spot because it does the most things right for the most buyers. The Tandem OLED panel — now standard across every C6 screen size, not just the large formats — delivers blacks that no Mini-LED can replicate. At $2,699 for the 65-inch, the C6 undercuts Samsung's comparable QLED while matching it in gaming performance. The Alpha 11 Gen 3 AI processor handles upscaling and noise reduction better than the C5, and the 4K 165Hz VRR support covers every current gaming requirement. This is the TV every serious reviewer named as the default recommendation for 2026, and I agree.

For buyers who live in rooms with windows and natural light, the Samsung S95F is the better answer. The combination of 2,000-nit QD-OLED brightness and the proprietary anti-glare matte coating eliminates the washed-out-in-daylight problem that plagues most OLED panels. If your living room looks like most living rooms, the S95F's real-world performance justifies its $3,299 price.

For value hunters, the TCL QM8K measured 4,540 nits peak brightness in independent lab tests — a figure that exceeds every OLED on this list. At $1,499 for the 65-inch, it represents the most extraordinary price-to-brightness ratio in the current market. The Hisense U8N is the alternative for anyone who wants solid Mini-LED performance under $1,100.

highlights.title: LG C6 Is the Default Recommendation for 2026
highlights.body: Every major reviewer landed on the same conclusion in early 2026: the C6 is the TV most people should buy. The Tandem OLED panel now applies across all screen sizes, not just the 77-inch and 83-inch flagship formats. That means the 65-inch and 55-inch versions deliver the same panel performance advantage over conventional OLED that was previously restricted to larger screens. The Alpha 11 Gen 3 AI processor is the best image processor LG has shipped to date, producing more accurate noise reduction and upscaling than the C5. At $2,699 for the 65-inch, the C6 is competitive with where the C5 launched and delivers improvements across every measurable category.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F Solves the Bright-Room OLED Problem
highlights.body: Traditional OLED TVs struggle with reflections. Most living rooms have windows, and most windows are not covered during daytime viewing. Samsung's S95F addresses this directly with a matte anti-reflective coating that essentially eliminates the glare problem. Paired with 2,000 nits QD-OLED peak brightness, the S95F holds its picture quality under ambient lighting conditions where the LG C6 looks washed out by comparison. The $3,299 price is a premium over the C6, but the use case is specific: if you watch TV in a room with significant natural or artificial light during viewing, the S95F's performance advantage in that environment justifies the price difference.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Is the Best Mini-LED Available
highlights.body: Sony's flagship Mini-LED earns its ranking through processing quality, not just raw specifications. The XR Backlight Master Drive local dimming system analyses scene content in real time and adjusts backlight zones with a precision that consistently outperforms competing Mini-LED systems. The XR Cognitive Processor's scene-by-scene color calibration produces contrast accuracy that approaches OLED performance in dark room conditions, while the panel's peak brightness capability exceeds what OLED can achieve. For buyers who want the best possible picture quality below the premium OLED price tier, the Bravia 9 is the correct choice at this point in 2026.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K Delivers Flagship-Level Brightness at Mid-Range Prices
highlights.body: In independent lab testing, the TCL QM8K 65-inch measured 4,540 nits peak brightness — a number that exceeds the LG G6, the Samsung S95F, and every other TV on this list. TCL achieves this with a dense QD Mini-LED backlight and phosphor technology that reaches brightness heights OLED manufacturing cannot match at current cost. At $1,499 for the 65-inch, the QM8K makes a compelling case for any buyer who watches TV in well-lit conditions or plays games where brightness visibility matters. The trade-off is black-level performance: in a fully dark room, the QM8K's per-zone local dimming cannot replicate the per-pixel control of OLED.

highlights.title: The LG G6 Is the Best TV Available, but the C6 Is the Better Purchase
highlights.body: The G6 Gallery OLED uses LG's Primary RGB Tandem panel technology, which achieves the highest OLED brightness ever measured in a consumer TV. It ships with a flush wall-mount bracket included and delivers picture quality that is technically superior to the C6 in both peak brightness and color volume at high brightness levels. At $3,499 for the 65-inch, the G6 costs $800 more than the C6 for gains that are visible only in controlled side-by-side comparisons under specific content conditions. The C6 is the better purchase for almost every buyer. The G6 earns its recommendation only for buyers with a genuine reason to prioritize maximum OLED brightness and a wall-mount installation plan.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的電視市場真的殺紅眼了。OLED 已經從貴族科技變成主流選擇，QD-OLED 把傳統 OLED 的亮度天花板打破，Mini-LED 也讓預算有限的消費者可以用一半的錢享受接近旗艦的畫質。

LG C6 排第一這件事沒什麼懸念。它把 Tandem OLED 面板全面下放到所有尺寸，去年 C5 只有大尺寸才有的技術，現在從 48 吋到 65 吋都用得上，同一個面板、同一個等級的黑色表現。搭配全新 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器，AI 影像處理、降噪、4K 放大品質都比 C5 明顯提升。4K 165Hz VRR 支援電競用途完全沒妥協。台灣估計售價約 NT$89,900，在旗艦 OLED 裡是有競爭力的入場定價。

三星 S95F 是台灣客廳最需要的電視。台灣家庭很少有能完全控光的電影院環境，窗戶、日照、頂燈都是日常現實。S95F 的霧面 QD-OLED 面板在這樣的環境裡表現最好，2,000 nits 峰值亮度加上抗反射塗層，開燈甚至開窗的情況下畫面依然清晰鮮豔。台灣售價 NT$154,900 是這份名單唯一已確認的官方定價，如果你家採光強，這個差距是值得的。

TCL QM8K 是這份名單最讓人驚訝的存在。65 吋約 NT$47,900 的 Mini-LED，實測峰值亮度 4,540 nits，比這份名單裡所有 OLED 電視都亮。電競 144Hz VRR 綽綽有餘。黑色層次輸給 OLED 是事實，但如果你住在採光很好的台灣公寓，或者主要用途是白天看球賽和打電競，TCL QM8K 就是這個價位的最強武器。

highlights.title: LG C6：2026 年 OLED 電視的基準線
highlights.body: 每個主要評測媒體的 2026 年最佳電視推薦都指向 C6，這個共識有很具體的理由。C6 把 Tandem OLED 面板下放到全系列所有尺寸，去年 C5 的 48 吋和 55 吋用的是普通 OLED 面板，C6 全面升級，讓小尺寸買家第一次能享受到 Tandem OLED 的黑色深度。Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器的 AI 影像處理更準確，噪訊抑制和 AI 放大品質提升明顯，動態解析度也更高。4K 165Hz VRR、低延遲輸入，這個價位能做到的電競表現已經沒有遺憾。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F：台灣客廳的 OLED 最強解
highlights.body: 台灣公寓客廳很少有完全控光的環境，西曬、頂燈、落地窗都是日常現實。S95F 的霧面 QD-OLED 面板是針對這種環境設計的，2,000 nits 峰值亮度加上抗反射塗層，在開燈、開窗的情況下依然保持鮮豔清晰的畫面，而一般 OLED 電視在這種場景裡很容易顯得黯淡。台灣售價 NT$154,900 是這份名單唯一可以當作購買參考的確認定價。如果你的客廳採光強，這台的日常體驗確實比 LG C6 更好。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9：不買 OLED 的最好理由
highlights.body: 不想花旗艦 OLED 的預算但又不想妥協畫質，Sony Bravia 9 是最有說服力的答案。XR Backlight Master Drive 局部背光調控在 Mini-LED 技術裡算是精準度最高的一批，搭配 XR 認知處理器逐幀場景分析，暗房觀看時對比度非常接近 OLED，同時亮度超越 OLED 的物理上限。台灣 Sony 有官方通路，約 NT$79,900 的估計售價在這個畫質層次算是合理的入場點。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K：預算有限時的亮度暴擊
highlights.body: 數據直接說話，QM8K 65 吋實測峰值亮度 4,540 nits，超過了這份名單裡所有 OLED 電視，包括頂級的 LG G6。TCL 用 QD 磷光體加密集 Mini-LED 背光達到這個數字，製造成本比 OLED 低，售價差距就是從這裡來的。約 NT$47,900 的 65 吋，144Hz VRR 電競支援，高亮度表現打敗旗艦。黑色層次確實比 OLED 差，每格局部背光的控制精準度是物理限制。但如果你住在採光很好的台灣公寓，或者白天看球賽的時間多過深夜電影，QM8K 就是這個預算段最超值的決定。

highlights.title: LG G6：最好的電視，但多數人應該買 C6
highlights.body: G6 用 Primary RGB Tandem OLED 面板創下消費級 OLED 的亮度新高，附贈嵌牆式壁掛支架，技術規格上是這份名單的絕對天花板。但它比 C6 貴約 NT$50,000，這個差距在日常觀看裡很難察覺，只有並排對比測試在高亮度 HDR 片段裡才看得出來。C6 是預算正常的買家更聰明的選擇，省下的錢拿去買好一點的音響更划算。G6 適合一種特定情境：你計劃把電視嵌牆安裝，而且你真的在乎那幾百 nits 的 OLED 亮度差距。
